name: ClipChase: YouTube channel transcript search
description: Ctrl+F for YouTube. Search everything a creator has said, across their whole channel, and jump to the exact second they said it.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; frame-src https://www.clipchase.xyz https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://www.youtube.com; connect-src 'self' https://us.i.posthog.com https://us-assets.i.posthog.com https://api.clipchase.xyz https://www.youtube.com https://*.youtube.com
